product_overview: Mente Financeira Vista is a web-based personal and small-business finance management platform that provides real-time visibility into cash flow, loans and overall financial health via a React frontend with Supabase persistence.
core_goals: Provide a centralized dashboard for monitoring balance, income, expenses and loans in real time.
Automate balance calculations by reconciling transactions, installments and loan activity.
Protect financial data using Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) and session controls.
Deliver a responsive, performant UI for quick insight and easy transaction management.

features.name: Financial Dashboard
features.description: Real-time summary and visualizations of key financial indicators (total balance, monthly income, monthly expenses, total loans) with trend charts.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/dashboard/summary with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with {balance, income, expenses, loans} -> GET /api/dashboard/charts?range=30d with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with time-series chart data
GET /api/dashboard/summary without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/dashboard/summary with Authorization: Bearer <token> but RLS prevents access -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Transaction History
features.description: Record, categorize and list cashflow transactions (entries and exits) with searchable history.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/transactions?limit=50&sort=desc with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with transactions list -> POST /api/transactions with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {type: 'income'|'expense', amount, date, category, description} -> Receive 201 with created transaction ID -> GET /api/transactions/{id} with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with created transaction
POST /api/transactions with Authorization: Bearer <token> and missing required field (amount or type) -> Receive 400 Validation Error
GET /api/transactions with expired or invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Loan Management
features.description: Create and track loans and their installments; loan payments automatically link to the transaction history and affect balances.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/loans with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with list of loans and status -> POST /api/loans with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {principal, interest_rate, installments, start_date, borrower} -> Receive 201 with loanId -> POST /api/loans/{loanId}/installments with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {installment_number, amount, date, paid:true} -> Receive 201 installment recorded -> GET /api/transactions?loanId={loanId} with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with transaction reflecting installment payment
POST /api/loans/{loanId}/installments with Authorization: Bearer <token> and amount exceeding remaining balance -> Receive 400 Overpayment Error
GET /api/loans with Authorization: Bearer <token> but user is not authorized by RLS -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: User Settings
features.description: Manage user preferences, identifiers (e.g., chat ID for notifications) and session-related settings persisted per user.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/user/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with user settings -> PUT /api/user/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {currency, timezone, notificationChatId} -> Receive 200 with updated settings -> GET /api/user/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with persisted updated settings
PUT /api/user/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> and invalid payload (e.g., invalid chat ID format) -> Receive 400 Validation Error
GET /api/user/settings without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Financial Dashboard
features.description: Real-time display of financial indicators (Balance, Income, Expenses, Loans) with charts.

features.name: Transaction History
features.description: Management and listing of financial transactions (cash flow).

features.name: Loan Management
features.description: Tracking and recording of loans and their respective installments.

features.name: User Settings
features.description: Storage of user preferences and session configuration.
